items.title: Segway flash sale drops the MAX G30P electric scooter with up to 40 miles of travel range to a new $500 low (Reg. $700)

Segway is currently having a flash sale on its MAX G30P Electric Scooter, dropping the price down to $499.99 shipped, while it only is available on Amazon in a refurbished condition at $450. It carries a $1,000 MSRP direct from the brand, but we’ve been more often seeing it stay between $600 and $700 outside of major sales. We last saw this model getting a flash sale to $550 at the top of March, but you’re getting even more savings and the best price ever with this deal while it lasts. Until April 11, you’ll be able to pick one up with $200 slashed from the going rate (and $500 off the MSRP) for a new all-time low.

AI apps can save time, but paying for multiple subscriptions is not viable long-term. If you rely on several different AI tools for your workflow, you’re functionally paying a fee just to do your job, and that’s not a price you’re ever done paying. ChatOn AI Assistant Premium is a new tool that combines popular AI tools like GPT and Sonar into one cohesive platform, and you can get a 5-year subscription on sale for $98 with code CHAT30 (Reg. $199.99).

items.title: Why safety regulators closed their investigation into Tesla’s remote parking feature

items.title: Leaker claims Nintendo is readying a Super Metroid remake for Switch 2
items.summary:
Nintendo has a serious leak problem right now, as we have already discussed. It seems as though just about all of its major 2026 releases have already surfaced online, leaving very little to the imagination when it comes to the upcoming summer and holiday Switch 2 release schedule. There are couple of other titles that have been mentioned among the leaks and, while they don’t come from sources quite as reliable as some of the others, if they do end up coming to fruition we could be in for a new Wario Land game and a potential new classic Metroid remake this year.
